summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Module 2 manual affiliate link flow (PATCH/DELETE /api/products/{country_code}/{hotmart_id}/manual-link). All 14 backend tests passed. All 14 frontend tests passed. The semi-automatic hotlink flow is fully functional.

issues: Clipboard API shows 'No se pudo copiar' in headless browser - this is expected behavior, works in real browser

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper validation for manual links (must contain 'hotmart.com')
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented: open-hotmart-{id}, manual-help, link-input-{id}, save-link-{id}, clear-link-{id}, link-saved-{id}, copy-link-{id}, view-product-{id}
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded from all API responses
Error handling returns appropriate HTTP status codes (400 for validation, 404 for not found)
Frontend properly shows/hides UI elements based on affiliate_status (pending vs manual)
test_credentials: No authentication required for this module
seed_data_creation: Products for AR (13 products) were created during testing via /api/products/match endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Module 2 manual link flow is fully functional. Backend endpoints tested: PATCH /api/products/{code}/{id}/manual-link (save with validation), DELETE /api/products/{code}/{id}/manual-link (clear), POST /api/hotmart/test-connection (oauth status). Frontend tested: ProductCard with 'Afiliarme en Hotmart' button, help panel with 3-step instructions, link input, save button, 'Link guardado' banner, copy button, clear (X) button. All existing Module 2 endpoints still work (hotmart/status, products/match, products/executions, products/{code}).

tests: Button opens product URL in new tab
Help panel contains '3 pasos rápidos' text
Green 'Link guardado' banner appears after save
'Copiar' button visible on saved link banner
'Afiliarme en Hotmart' button reappears after clear

module2_manual_link_validations.patch_endpoint: PATCH /api/products/{code}/{id}/manual-link validates: non-empty link, must contain 'hotmart.com', product must exist
module2_manual_link_validations.delete_endpoint: DELETE /api/products/{code}/{id}/manual-link clears link, resets affiliate_status to 'pending'
module2_manual_link_validations.test_connection: POST /api/hotmart/test-connection returns oauth status (oauth_ok_scopes_missing with current creds)
module2_manual_link_validations.frontend_flow: User clicks 'Afiliarme en Hotmart' → opens product URL → help panel shows → user pastes link → clicks Guardar → green banner appears with Copiar button
